description: JIT exception unwinding realm mismatch - trampoline native frames did not restore the caller realm when unwinding an exception. The fix changes js/src/jit/JSJitFrameIter.cpp, JSJitFrameIter.h, JitFrames.cpp, and js/src/vm/FrameIter.cpp so frame iteration recognizes TrampolineNative frames and recovers their callee/realm information. Before the fix, a cross-global Array.prototype.toSorted comparator that threw could leave cx->realm() pointing at the wrong compartment, tripping Realm.h assertions in debug builds and risking cross-compartment access violations in release builds.

fixes.description: Bug 1888614 - Fix exception handler to restore realm for
